channel.title: 2026-05-16 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-16 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: A physics-guided neural network with analytical self-attenuation correction for rapid efficiency calibration of HPGe detectors
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Jonay González Guerra
Efficiency calibration of HPGe detectors for environmental gamma-ray spectrometry requires knowing the full energy peak efficiency (FEPE) for each combination of photon energy, sample geometry and material composition. We present a physics-guided neural network that decouples this problem into a multilayer perceptron---trained on a single reference material to learn FEPE as a function of energy and sample height---and a fixed analytical layer that corrects for self-attenuation using XCOM mass attenuation coefficients. Two levels of geometric correction are evaluated: the classical parallel beam (PB) formula and a geometric ray-tracing (RT) approach with solid-angle weighting. The methodology is validated on two HPGe detectors of fundamentally different geometry---a well-type and a planar…

item.title: 堆垛诱导的高自旋陈数II型量子自旋霍尔绝缘体与非传统磁性
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect Publication: Science Bulletin
该工作理论预测了一类通过层状堆垛工程实现的II型量子自旋霍尔绝缘体，体系具有高自旋陈数特征并与非传统磁性共存。研究为拓扑量子材料的设计提供了新思路，具体计算细节需查阅原文。

item.title: Weyl点显著增强反铁磁范德华金属GdTe₃的热电性能
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect Publication: Science Bulletin
该研究在反铁磁范德华金属GdTe₃中发现了Weyl点对热电性能的显著增强效应，揭示了拓扑能带结构与热电输运之间的关联。具体增强机制与实验测量数据需查阅原文。

item.title: 基于可验证奖励强化学习的LLM生成式平面户型设计
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luis Lara, Aristides Milios, Zhi Hao Luo, Aditya Sharma, Ge Ya Luo, Christopher Beckham, Florian Golemo, Christopher Pal
作者提出基于文本的户型生成方法：先在真实平面图上微调LLM，再采用具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）以提升对房间拓扑连接和数值约束（尺寸、面积）的遵从度，同时抑制无效或重叠输出。配套设计了约束遵从度量，在真实性、兼容性与多样性等指标上优于现有方法，兼容性指标相对降低至少94%。

item.title: 有序量子磁体的非微扰半经典自旋动力学
item.description:
📚 npj Quantum Materials
👤 Hao Zhang, Tianyue Huang, Allen O. Scheie, Mengze Zhu, Tao Xie, N. Murai 等10位作者
该工作发展了适用于有序量子磁体的非微扰半经典自旋动力学理论方法，旨在超越传统微扰论框架处理强关联自旋系统的动力学行为。研究发表于npj Quantum Materials，具体技术细节与数值结果需查阅原文。

item.title: 电容触摸屏面临风险：通过电磁辐射恢复智能手机手写轨迹
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yukun Cheng, Shiyu Zhu, Changhai Ou, Xingshuo Han, Yuan Li, Shihui Zheng
作者揭示了电容触摸屏存在的电磁侧信道泄漏，并提出非接触攻击框架TESLA，可实时将书写时的电磁信号回归为二维手写轨迹。在多款商用智能手机上的测试显示，字符识别准确率达77%，Jaccard指数为0.74，能高度还原原始手写内容。

item.title: Practical Evaluation of Quantum Kernel Methodsfor Radar Micro-Doppler Classification on Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) Hardware
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Vikas Agnihotri Vikas Agnihotri, Jasleen Kaur Jasleen Kaur, Sarvagya Kaushik Sarvagya Kaushik
This work presents an empirical study of a Quantum Support Vector Machine(QSVM) for classification of radar micro-Doppler signatures, used here as astructured benchmark for evaluating quantum kernel methods under realistichardware constraints. Extracted classical features are reduced using PrincipalComponent Analysis (PCA) to enable compact quantum encoding, and mappedinto a quantum kernel feature space through a fully entangling ZZFeatureMap.Classification is performed using a kernel-based QSVM and compared with aclassical SVM baseline under consistent preprocessing and evaluation conditions.Performance is assessed in both ideal simulation and on NISQ-era superconducting quantum processors, specifically IBM Torino (133-qubit) and IBM Fez(156-qubit). Results show that the QSVM attains com…

item.title: Linking DC transport properties and entanglement negativity in non-Hermitian superlattices
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 L. S. Lima
We investigate how non-Hermitian effects in one-dimensional superlattices incorporating gain and loss imbalance, asymmetric hopping, and complex potentials modify both electrical transport and quantum correlations. Using a family of generalized Su–Schrieffer–Heeger (SSH) superlattice Hamil-tonians with tunable sublattice asymmetry and non-reciprocity, we compute, linear response transport coefficients, and mixed-state entanglement measures across parameter regimes (PT-symmetric broken regime). We find robust signatures linking the onset of the skin effect and spectral winding to enhanced local currents and strongly inhomogeneous entanglement profiles, and topological edge modes to finite entanglement negativity in otherwise mixed steady states. Our results clarify when transport and entan…

item.title: Association of type III solar radio bursts with solar flares as observed by XSM onboard Chandrayaan-2
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Abhishek Potdar, Anshu Kumari
Solar radio bursts in the metric and decametric ranges are direct signatures of accelerated electrons in the solar atmosphere. It is almost always the case that these bursts are associated with solar flares. In the present study, we investigated the temporal association between solar flares observed by the x-ray solar monitor (xsm) onboard the Chandrayaan-2 orbiter and solar radio bursts from ground-based radio observatories. We studied properties of 729 solar flares and radio burst events from September 2019 to November 2022. Out of these 729 events, 617 events (≈ 85%) are found to be associated with type III radio bursts. We found a strong correlation (r≈ 0.99) between the flare and the radio burst onset times. Type III radio bursts showed a consistent onset time delay with respect to t…

item.title: Tunable Distance Quantum Error Correction at 29 Percent Encoding Rate of the Face Centered Cubic Lattice
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Raghu Kulkarni
The [[3𝐿3, 2𝐿3+2, 3]] CSS code on the Face-Centered Cubic (FCC) lattice achieves 67.7% encoding rate with weight-12 stabilizers, but its distance is capped at 𝑑 = 3 by weight-3 logical operators sitting at tetrahedral interstitial voids. These logicals carry a geometric fingerprint—one error per triad sheet, all three converging at a known void—that makes them detectable by a flag ancilla measuring the three-body parity 𝑍𝑒𝑎𝑍𝑒𝑏𝑍𝑒𝑐 . The weight-3 logical flips this parity from +1 to −1; the stabilizer syndrome stays silent, but the flag sees it. Running 𝑅 independent flag rounds per syndrome cycle pushes the logical failure rate to 𝑝3+𝑅, so the effective distance is simply 𝑑eff = 3+𝑅—adjustable at runtime, with no changes to the code or its logical count. At 𝑅 = 4 the FCC+flags code achieve…

item.title: Determination and comparison of triacylglycerol composition of tea (Camellia sinensis) oil and extra virgin olive oil using 1H NMR and UV–Visible spectroscopy
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Hagos Hagos, Girma Workeneh Woyessa, Amitabha Datta
The authentication and quality assessment of edible oils remain essential due to increasing cases of adulteration and the strong dependence of oil quality on origin, processing, and storage. Tea seed oil and extra virgin olive oil are particularly valued for their high nutritional and medicinal benefits, yet both contain very low levels of ω-3 triunsaturated fatty acids, making accurate quantification analytically challenging. In this study, we establish a simple and reliable quantitative approach for determining the triacylglycerol (TAG) profiles of tea seed oil and extra virgin olive oil using high-resolution 1H NMR (800 MHz), supported by UV–Visible spectroscopy. The enhanced magnetic field strength allowed us to resolve the bisallylic proton signals at δ 2.69–2.77 ppm, enabling direct…

item.title: 隐藏阈值实现液晶螺旋的可调控以用于节能技术
item.description:
📚 Physics News
该研究揭示了材料成分微小变化即可精确调控液晶在电磁场中的行为，发现了一种隐藏的阈值机制，可实现对液晶螺旋结构的高效调控。该技术在显示与先进传感系统等领域具有节能应用潜力。

item.title: 具有磁控可重编程手术功能的微型软体机器人
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Chelsea Shan Xian Ng, Yu Xuan Yeoh, Nicholas Yong Wei Foo, Keerthana Radhakrishnan, Guo Zhan Lum
该工作发表于 Advanced Materials，介绍了一种可通过磁场重编程实现多种手术功能的微型软体机器人，具体设计与性能详见原文。

item.title: De novo design of peptides localizing at the interface of biomolecular condensates
item.description:
📚 Nature Communications
👤 Timo N. Schneider, Marcos Gil-Garcia, Marco A. Bühler, Lucas F. Santos, Lenka Faltova, Gonzalo Guillén-Gosálbez 等7位作者
Nature Communications, Published online: 16 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-73099-9 Combining high-throughput molecular simulations, machine learning, and mixed-integer linear programming, the authors design peptides that localize to condensate interfaces, revealing surfactant-like, charge-dependent sequence rules.

item.title: ICED：基于可解释概念分解的概念级机器遗忘
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shen Lin, Jing Lin, Junhao Dong, Piotr Koniusz, Li Xu
针对视觉-语言模型遗忘多在图像/实例级、难以精准移除目标知识的问题，作者利用多模态大模型从遗忘集中构建紧凑的任务专属概念词表，将视觉表示分解为稀疏非负概念组合。在此基础上将遗忘形式化为概念级优化，选择性抑制目标概念同时保留实例内非目标语义与全局跨模态知识，在域内外遗忘设定上均取得良好效果。

item.title: A physics-constrained gated recurrent unit constitutive surrogate for soil stress- strain prediction in finite element analysis
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Bo Sun, Shizhong Wei, Yu Hua
Purely data-driven models often lack physical consistency in soil stress-strain prediction, which limits their stable use in finite element simulations. To address this limitation, this study proposes a soil constitutive surrogate model based on a gated recurrent unit (GRU) with multilayer physical constraints, aiming to improve prediction accuracy, physical plausibility, and numerical stability. A total of 3375 triaxial compression stress-strain sequences, each containing 23 loading steps, are generated using the Modified Cam-Clay (MCC) model. Soil parameters (λ, κ, M, ν, e₀, p₀) and axial strain are used as inputs. The proposed GRU-PINN model incorporates stress-path constraints, strain-geometry constraints, and monotonicity and saturation constraints for volumetric strain. The network…

item.title: [ASAP] Multiresolution Quantum Chemistry: Nonlinear Response Properties at the Basis Set Limit
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Adrian Hurtado, Hideo Sekino, and Robert J. Harrison
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.6c00466

item.title: Chemical diversity of bilin species defines the chiroptical landscape of phytochromes
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Andreas Winkler, Oliver Eder, Chongyao Wei, Marie Reißenbüchel, Igor Schapiro
Phytochromes are widespread red/far-red light-sensing photoreceptors across several kingdoms of life that enable organisms to adapt their physiology to changing light environments. Major evolutionary transitions, from proteobacteria to cyanobacteria, algae and plants, imposed selective pressure on these proteins to diversify their spectral properties through changes in bilin cofactor preference. This adaptation coincided with a structural relocation of a cysteine residue, the covalent cofactor attachment site, from the N-terminal segment (NTS) to the GAF domain. Here, using the model protein IsPadC, we demonstrate how the shift from biliverdin- to phycocyanobilin-binding phytochromes modulates spectroscopic signatures while retaining overall functionality. We further resolve the long-stan…

item.title: 3D侧链拓扑驱动的双纤维互穿网络实现20.31%效率层层加工有机太阳能电池
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Jiankui Zhang, Xingjian Dai, Chentong Liao, Weilin Zhou, Qingsong Huang, Xiaopeng Xu, Yihui Wu, Qiang Peng
该工作通过设计具有三维侧链拓扑的受体分子，构建双纤维互穿活性层形貌，制备层层加工有机太阳能电池并实现20.31%的能量转换效率。具体机理与器件细节请参阅原文。

item.title: 用于亚摩尔势成像的原子级单电子晶体管
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect Publication: Science Bulletin
该工作开发了基于原子级单电子晶体管的扫描探针技术，实现了对亚摩尔周期势（sub-moiré potential）的高分辨成像。该方法为研究转角电子学体系中的局域电子态提供了新工具。

item.title: 钙通道阻断剂对广豆根细胞内钙分布及钙信号相关基因表达的影响
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Ying Liang, Shuangshuang Qin, Guili Wei, Yuan Huang, Hong He, Fan Wei
作者使用LaCl3、Na3VO4和EGTA分别阻断质膜钙通道、Ca2+-ATP酶和螯合胞外钙，在处理后20、40、60天通过焦锑酸钾沉淀-透射电镜及qPCR分析广豆根叶片与根尖的钙亚细胞分布及相关基因表达。结果显示三种处理引发不同的钙稳态调节策略：LaCl3引起胞内钙积累后通过替代外排途径缓解，Na3VO4致持续性钙毒性，EGTA则促使根尖动员内源钙库；StCML9等基因在根中显著上调，揭示了钙信号通路功能分化的分子机制。
